name: Module Performance Matrix
description: So sánh hiệu năng giữa các module và kỳ học (pass rate, độ dài, VLE engagement).

cards.text: 📚 Module Performance Matrix — So sánh chéo các môn
Phân tích **7 module × 4 kỳ** để trả lời: module nào hiệu quả nhất? Có tương quan giữa độ dài khóa với pass rate? VLE click ảnh hưởng thế nào? Dùng để **review curriculum** + **resource allocation**.

cards.name: Best Performing Module
cards.query:
SELECT CONCAT(dc.code_module, ' (',
              ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1),
              '% pass)') AS best_module
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Course dc ON fp.course_key = dc.course_key
GROUP BY dc.code_module
ORDER BY AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) DESC
LIMIT 1

cards.name: Most Challenging Module
cards.query:
SELECT CONCAT(dc.code_module, ' (',
              ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1),
              '% pass)') AS worst_module
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Course dc ON fp.course_key = dc.course_key
GROUP BY dc.code_module
ORDER BY AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) ASC
LIMIT 1

cards.name: Module Pass Rate Ranking
cards.query:
SELECT dc.code_module AS Module,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Course dc ON fp.course_key = dc.course_key
GROUP BY dc.code_module ORDER BY pass_rate_pct DESC

cards.name: Module x Presentation Pass Rate
cards.query:
SELECT dc.code_module AS Module, dc.code_presentation AS Kỳ,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Course dc ON fp.course_key = dc.course_key
GROUP BY dc.code_module, dc.code_presentation
ORDER BY dc.code_module, dc.code_presentation

cards.name: Score by Assessment Type per Module
cards.query:
SELECT dc.code_module AS Module, da.assessment_type AS `Loại bài`,
       ROUND(AVG(fp.score), 1) AS avg_score
FROM Fact_Performance fp
JOIN Dim_Course dc ON fp.course_key = dc.course_key
JOIN Dim_Assessment da ON fp.assessment_key = da.assessment_key
WHERE fp.score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY dc.code_module, da.assessment_type
ORDER BY dc.code_module, da.assessment_type

cards.text:
### 💡 Insight #1 — Module length không tương quan thuận với pass rate
Không phải module dài hơn = pass rate cao hơn. Có module 240 ngày pass rate vẫn thấp. **Yếu tố quyết định không phải thời lượng** — có thể là chất lượng nội dung, density assessment, support sinh viên.

cards.name: Module Length vs Pass Rate
cards.query:
SELECT dc.code_module AS Module,
       ROUND(AVG(dc.module_presentation_length), 0) AS avg_length_days,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN fp.final_result IN ('Pass','Distinction') THEN 100.0 ELSE 0.0 END), 1) AS pass_rate_pct
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Course dc ON fp.course_key = dc.course_key
GROUP BY dc.code_module ORDER BY avg_length_days

cards.name: VLE Click Intensity per Module
cards.query:
SELECT dc.code_module AS Module,
       ROUND(AVG(fp.total_clicks), 0) AS avg_clicks_per_record
FROM Fact_Performance fp JOIN Dim_Course dc ON fp.course_key = dc.course_key
GROUP BY dc.code_module ORDER BY avg_clicks_per_record DESC

cards.text:
### 🟢 Recommended Actions

1. **Curriculum review cho 2 module có pass rate < 50%** — workshop với giảng viên + sample content audit
2. **Best practice sharing** — module top performer chia sẻ pedagogy với module yếu
3. **VLE engagement target**: module có click thấp cần activity hấp dẫn hơn (forum, gamification)
4. **Theo dõi inter-presentation variance** — nếu 1 module pass rate dao động lớn giữa các kỳ → có yếu tố ngoài (giảng viên, cohort khác nhau)
